data.title: List Your Home
data.subtitle: Let's get your property sold for top dollar.

data.bio: Angela manages the listing lifecycle from staging consultation through closing. Her background in interior design and marketing ensures every Sterling listing presents at its absolute best — averaging just 18 days on market.
